name: Nutty-Fruity Tea King
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop apricots or use 1/3 cup candied fruits. In a large bowl, mix 2 cups flour, sugar, salt and yeast.
2. Heat sour cream, water and 1/4 cup butter until hot. Add to dry ingredients.
3. Beat on low speed for 2 minutes. Add egg and beat for 2 more minutes at medium speed.
4. Stir in enough remaining flour to make a soft dough.
5. Knead on a floured surface for 4 minutes. Place in greased bowl, cover and let rise in warm place until doubled in size, about 20 minutes.
6. Punch down the dough. Roll to a 16 by 9-inch rectangle. Spread remaining 2 tablespoons butter over dough.
7. In a small bowl, combine fruit, nuts, brown sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle over dough.
8. Roll as for a jelly roll, sealing ends. Place on greased baking sheet, seam sides down.
9. Seal the ends to form a ring. Cut slits about 2/3 of the way through at one inch intervals.
10. Turn each section on its side. Cover and let rise in warm place until almost doubled, about 20 minutes.
11. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes. Cool, then drizzle with glaze.
Glaze:
Mix powdered sugar, butter and water until smooth.
